# [Free WordPress Plugin] Find why your website visitors leave

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-04-08 17:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 668

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Did you know 88% of your first-time site visitors won't give your
site a second chance if they find it confusing or frustrating?

Even worse: most of them won't leave a comment or email to tell
you what's wrong - they'll just click away and never return.

That means you lose a potential customer and miss out on an
opportunity chance to fix a website issue that made them leave.

If only there was a free tool that entices your site visitors to
give you feedback before they leave.

Meet UserFeedback 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.n37wRKUgBfqyxN1waikxu3p64VO5axlPs6nCkdHYsD4 ), 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.n37wRKUgBfqyxN1waikxu3p64VO5axlPs6nCkdHYsD4 ) the free
WordPress Plugin.

UserFeedback lets you create quick and easy surveys to collect
real-time feedback about your website. It lets you discover
exactly what your visitors are thinking and fix issues before
they cost you valuable traffic and paying customers.

UserFeedback Lite 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.n37wRKUgBfqyxN1waikxu3p64VO5axlPs6nCkdHYsD4 )
You can show the surveys exactly where and when you need them,
whether that's on specific pages, for certain devices, or based
on user behavior like exit-intent.

Here are just some of the game-changing insights you can uncover:

* Why visitors leave without subscribing to your email list
* Why visitors aren't staying to read your content
* What's making your navigation menu confusing for visitors
* Why people are clicking away from your important pages
* What's stopping website visitors from making a purchase

In short, it's like having a direct line to your visitors'
thoughts.

👉 Get UserFeedback for FREE Today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.n37wRKUgBfqyxN1waikxu3p64VO5axlPs6nCkdHYsD4 ) 👈

But here's where it gets really exciting...

For website owners who want to see exactly how visitors interact
with their site, UserFeedback Pro ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..H-thlMyh347zZ2IZhcQUIpYF9G1uVpKwfyN1xhRz0pg )  now includes an incredible new heatmap feature!

The powerful heatmap technology shows you where visitors click,
how far they scroll, and where they move their mouse on your
site. It's like having X-ray vision into your visitors' behavior!

Until next time,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
